# Auto-Generated Narrative Skill

Generated: 2026-03-22T21:21:37.842Z

## Trigger
Segment exhibits effective use of symbolic objects and atmospheric closure to end an arc while maintaining narrative tension.

## Guidelines
- Use a distinct sound or object interaction to mark the definitive end of a scene
- Reflect internal themes or conflicts through external environment descriptions
- Introduce a subtle element that hints at unresolved future conflicts or cycles

## Examples
- The phone clicked off, silence filling the room. Outside, the storm broke, but the lightning still flashed on the horizon.
- He buried the letter, patting the earth flat. The river flowed on, carrying secrets downstream to the sea.
